subject: [CONTRIB][AWX] Fix Web Interface
commit_message:
[CONTRIB][AWX] Fix Web Interface

Add NGINX configuration so it can be run as non root.

Issue-ID: INT-1858
Signed-off-by: Othman Touijer <othman.touijer@soprasteria.com>
Change-Id: I8e313a49db0dfadf5c180c4415c7237ffd3635f9

It seems that you don"t have a commit body.

You must add at least one sentence explaining the purpose of the commit ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/943/ )

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/943/ )
